contact_points.usage: Grasp point for moving the bottle.

frame_hint.note: For grasp, represent approach using +z of CONTACT.

contact_points.description: Neck area below the bottle mouth
contact_points.usage: Alternative grasp point for precise placement near the mouth.

functional_points.description: Bottle mouth opening axis (target insertion axis)
functional_points.usage: Target axis for cap insertion/seating. Tightening is only meaningful after seating.

policy.align: Axis alignment is a TILT rotation (ω) about an axis perpendicular to insertion_axis (choose x/z candidate).
policy.tighten_or_loosen: Only if explicitly requested: rotate (ω) about spin_axis.
